positive: A whimsical watercolor illustration of a group of friendly woodland creatures (fox, deer, owl) having a picnic under a massive bioluminescent mushroom. Style of Studio Ghibli meets botanical etching, soft pastel colors, intricate details, high resolution, storybook aesthetic.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, oversaturated, harsh lines
